form.formComment: Last start 7th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 6th- beaten 5 m by Debra (1:57.00) in 5yo on March 23 at $39.20. Two runs back 7th over 1609m at this track, beaten 30 m by Seeking Salvation (1:55.20) on March 9 at $7.45. Recent form suggests he needs to lift.

form.formComment: Returns after ten months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4.5 m finishing fourth behind Myfriendjose at this track over 1609m in a 5yo on July 1 at $14.45. Previous preparation first-up won by a 0.8 m at this track (1:59.30) beating Houston Seelster in 5yo on April 10 2025 at $4.70. Going okay so keep him safe.
